basic_info.name: Haikou Vigour Coast OUTLETS Wave Pool (海口·活力海岸 OUTLETS 浪池) - NOT VERIFIED. Despite the original entry referring to a Wavegarden-class artificial wave pool adjacent to CR MixC Haikou (华润万象城), no public record - Chinese or international - confirms the existence, construction, or formal announcement of any wave pool by this name as of 2026-05. The 'Vibrant Coast' / '活力海岸' label appears in Haikou West Coast tourism master-plans as a brand concept but is not associated with a Wavegarden Cove or any other named surf-pool tenant.
basic_info.location: Allegedly adjacent to CR MixC Haikou (华润万象城). CR MixC Haikou itself is located at 4 Jinmao East Road, Longhua District, Haikou (海口市龙华区金贸东路4号) - an inland CBD location, not coastal, and 12.3万㎡ of pure shopping-mall floor area opened 2022-06-26. No adjacent wave-pool plot has been identified in public planning documents.
basic_info.operator: [uncertain] - No operator identified. No company has been linked to a Haikou Vigour Coast OUTLETS wave pool in industry press, Chinese local media, or Wavegarden / American Wave Machines / Endless Surf licensee announcements.
basic_info.opening_date: [uncertain] - No opening date exists because no project has been confirmed. WavePoolMag's '2026 New Wave Pools' worldwide list contains no Chinese facility for 2026.

technical_specs.wave_technology_brand: [uncertain] - No technology brand has been announced or installed. Wavegarden's official 2026 'Six new world-class surf destinations' announcement names DSRT Surf (USA), El Nido (Uruguay), Surfers Cove (Portugal), Gemswell Surf Madrid (Spain), Perth Surf Park (Australia), Auckland Surf Park (NZ) - no Hainan project. PerfectSwell's only Hainan deployment is SURFLAND at Wanning Riyue Bay, ~60 km from Haikou.

surroundings.nearby_accommodation: [uncertain] - Not applicable to a non-existent wave pool. For reference, the CR MixC Haikou area in Longhua District CBD has multiple high-end hotels including Haikou Marriott Hotel, Sheraton Haikou Hotel, Mandarin Oriental Haikou (price range roughly 700-2500 RMB/night).
surroundings.on_site_accommodation: [uncertain] - Not applicable; no on-site accommodation exists because no wave pool exists.
surroundings.nearby_food: [uncertain] - Not applicable to a non-existent wave pool. CR MixC Haikou itself houses 200+ F&B tenants including Heytea, Starbucks Reserve, Din Tai Fung and various Hainanese restaurants.
surroundings.transport: [uncertain] - Not applicable. CR MixC Haikou is reachable via Haikou Metro (planned), didi/taxi, and city buses; located in central Longhua District CBD.
surroundings.transport_to_nearest_airport: [uncertain] - Not applicable. For reference, CR MixC Haikou is approximately 25 km / 40-50 minutes by car from Haikou Meilan International Airport (HAK).
surroundings.combined_itinerary: [uncertain] - Not applicable; the only operating Hainan artificial wave pool (SURFLAND PerfectSwell at Wanning Riyue Bay) is roughly 2 hours' drive from CR MixC Haikou and is the genuine surf-itinerary destination for travellers based in Haikou.

reviews_reputation.user_reviews: [uncertain] - No user reviews exist on Xiaohongshu, Mafengwo, Dianping, Ctrip, or Trip.com for any 'Vigour Coast OUTLETS Wave Pool' in Haikou.
reviews_reputation.recommended_for: [uncertain] - Not applicable; project does not exist.
reviews_reputation.operator_brand_partnership: [uncertain] - No partnerships announced. CR Land (华润置地) operates CR MixC Haikou but has not announced a wave-pool annex with any wave-tech brand.

verification.verification_sources: Verification searches conducted 2026-05-15 returned no evidence that a wave pool branded 'Vigour Coast OUTLETS' or '活力海岸 OUTLETS 浪池' exists in Haikou. Sources consulted: (1) WavePoolMag 'New Wave Pools 2026: All the Surf Parks Opening This Year' lists every wave pool opening worldwide in 2026 - no Chinese facility appears: https://wavepoolmag.com/new-wave-pools-2026/ ; (2) Wavegarden's official 'Six new world-class surf destinations on the horizon' announcement (April 2026) names DSRT Surf USA, El Nido Uruguay, Surfers Cove Portugal, Gemswell Surf Madrid Spain, Perth Surf Park Australia, Auckland Surf Park NZ - no Hainan or Haikou project: https://amusementtoday.com/2026/04/6-new-wavegarden-world-class-surf-destinations-on-the-horizon/ ; (3) CR MixC Haikou (华润万象城) Baidu Baike confirms address 4 Jinmao East Road, Longhua District, opened 2022-06-26, 12.3万㎡, pure island-tourism-themed shopping mall with no wave-pool component: https://baike.baidu.com/item/万象城/61621726 ; (4) Tencent News on Haikou West Coast 1.92万亩 master plan (2025-05-27) describes a 12.8 km² mixed-use coastal redevelopment using the '活力海岸' / 'Vibrant Coast' brand concept, but no Wavegarden Cove or named wave-pool tenant is listed: https://news.qq.com/rain/a/20250527A07JSF00 ; (5) Local-news sweep across Sohu, Hainan Daily, Haikou Bendibao, Hainan.gov.cn, Sina Hainan, CGTN, TropicalHainan, Surfer, Surfline confirms the only operating Olympic-grade artificial wave pool in Hainan as of 2026-05 is SURFLAND PerfectSwell at Wanning Riyue Bay (~60 km from Haikou), not in Haikou: https://www.tropicalhainan.com/chinas-first-olympic-standard-wave-pool-opens-in-wanning-hainan/ , https://www.koreaherald.com/article/10623347 ; (6) The most prominent new Haikou waterfront commercial project '浪潮里' on Haidian Island (Sina Finance 2026-04-29) is a 30,000㎡ riverside lifestyle complex with no wave-/surf-functionality despite the 'wave' wordplay in its name: https://finance.sina.com.cn/jjxw/2026-04-29/doc-inhwckrq6798021.shtml ; (7) Haikou Bendibao 2026 events index lists no wave-pool opening or surfing event in Haikou: https://m.haikou.bendibao.com/xiuxian/huodongchaxun/ ; (8) Xiaohongshu / Zhihu user-generated content on Haikou surfing only references natural beach surfing at locations such as Holiday Beach (假日海滩), Xiying Beach (西秀海滩), and the Hou Hai natural surf village (in Sanya, not Haikou). Conclusion: as of 2026-05-15 the entry 'Haikou Vigour Coast OUTLETS Wave Pool' is most likely a misattribution or speculative listing; no operating, under-construction, or formally announced wave pool by that name has been identified.
